scene: A solid horizontal rectangular {{material}} surface spanning {{block_width}} cells wide by 1 cell tall, with sharp 90-degree corners filling the entire canvas edge-to-edge. The surface has subtle {{theme_name}}-themed decorative relief patterns reading as one cohesive horizontal piece.
style: flat vector, bold cel-shaded, high-contrast graphic style
lighting: simple two-tone cel shading with highlight on upper-left and shadow on lower-right

background.details: NO background layer. The solid {{material}} block surface occupies 100% of the canvas.

composition: the {{material}} surface occupies the full canvas, with decorative patterns as subtle accents reading as one unified piece, not {{block_width}} separate tiles
medium: digital vector-style illustration with minimal texture
details: the {{material}} surface fills 100% of the canvas — sharp corners, no rounded edges, no gaps
must read as ONE cohesive horizontal piece, not {{block_width}} repeated tiles
limited to 2-3 tonal shades of {{primary_color}} for clarity
effects: surface-integrated vignette using multiply shading of {{material}} color
continuous pattern flow across full width
usage_notes: This is a game tile. The material surface must fill the entire canvas edge-to-edge. Decoration should be tasteful, not overwhelming. Must NOT look like {{block_width}} identical tiles side by side.
